mapper.sql: id, user_id, delta, balance_after, source_type, biz_no, remark, operator, created_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_point_journal (user_id, delta, balance_after, source_type, biz_no, remark, operator, created_at, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{delta}, #{balanceAfter}, #{sourceType}, #{bizNo}, #{remark}, #{operator}, #{createdAt}, #{version})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_point_journal WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
